description:
Samsung Electronics is a global leader in technology, opening new possibilities for people everywhere. Through relentless innovation and discovery, we are transforming the worlds of TVs, smartphones, wearable devices, tablets, digital appliances, network systems, medical devices, semiconductors and LED solutions. Samsung is also leading in the Internet of Things space through, among others, our Smart Home and Digital Health initiatives. 

Since being established in 1969, Samsung Electronics has grown into one of the world’s leading technology companies, and become recognized as one of the top 10 global brands. Our network now extends across the world, and Samsung takes great pride in the creativity and diversity of its talented people, who drive our growth. To discover more, please visit our website at www.samsung.com and our official newsroom at news.samsung.com
description_enriched: Samsung is a company that offers a wide range of products including mobile, TV, home electronics, and home appliances.
description_metadata_raw: Discover the latest in electronic & smart appliance technology with Samsung. Find the next big thing from smartphones & tablets to laptops & tvs & more.

company_updates.description:
Welcome to Samsung Insights.
Samsung Art Store, transforming everyday screens into world-class digital canvases, is now featured front and center in the latest edition of our Samsung Insights newsletter.🖼️ From new partnerships with globally renowned museums to bringing the vibrant energy of Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 directly into your living room, we explore how Samsung is redefining the way we discover, experience, and live with art. 
✔️Subscribe to receive the latest stories!

Welcome to Samsung Insights.

Samsung's new "Expressive Design" approach puts people—not technology—at the center of innovation. ✨
✔ Subscribe to read the full story.

Samsung Electronics is hosting the "Design is an Act of Love" exhibition at Milan Design Week 2026, from April 20 to 26. Through 12 immersive spaces, the installation reveals how technology can integrate meaningfully into everyday life. We invite you to watch the video below for a closer look inside the exhibition, a space that embodies the company’s human-centric “Expressive Design” approach.

Welcome to Samsung Insights.
The Galaxy S26 series, unveiled at Galaxy Unpacked 2026, is now featured front and center in the latest edition of our Samsung Insights newsletter. 📱
 
✔ Subscribe to receive the latest stories!

Get ready for a mobile experience designed to remove friction from the things you do every day.

On February 25, Samsung Electronics will host Galaxy Unpacked in San Francisco. Join us as we unveil Samsung’s newest Galaxy innovations – marking a new phase in the era of AI as intelligence becomes truly personal and adaptive. The event will be streamed live on Samsung.com, Samsung Newsroom, and Samsung’s YouTube channel beginning at 10 a.m. PT, 1 p.m. EST, 6 p.m. GMT and 7 p.m. CET

"What role will AI play in our lives?" Samsung Electronics CEO TM Roh writes in the Wall Street Journal that it will create a profound impact by seamlessly integrating into daily living. 
Read more at https://lnkd.in/gSuDjsJ8

From the SW seven-year upgrade to the AI digital inverter compressor, learn how Samsung’s innovation allows products to continue evolving while enhancing the durability of core components. 

Check the link below to explore how Samsung is transforming the appliance care paradigm from repair to prevention using AI and hardware innovation through an interview with Miyoung Yoo, EVP and Head of the Global CS Team, DA Business at Samsung Electronics.

Welcome to the December edition of Samsung Insights. Read on to explore how Samsung’s latest innovation is redefining the foldable experience for ultimate productivity.

✔ Subscribe to read stories!

Marking the first successful demonstration on a live commercial network, Samsung Electronics and KT Corporation validated user-level AI-RAN optimization technology with approximately 18,000 users. 

Explore how this focus on user-perceived communication quality is an essential step for the 6G era.

Samsung Insight is a newsletter delivering the stories of Samsung insiders and the flow of innovation. Be the first to access behind-the-scenes stories and the latest updates—subscribe to Samsung Insight today.

Samsung Electronics partners with Turkish Airlines to elevate the travel experience through SmartThings Find. Starting from December 1, the two companies will launch the “Smart Tagged Baggage Service,” enabling Turkish Airlines passengers to quickly track lost or delayed baggage using Samsung’s location tracking service, SmartThings Find.

Explore how this convenient and streamlined service is the launch point for future, expanded collaborations.

The November edition of Samsung Insights is here.
This month, we turn to the Why Samsung interview series to explore how SmartThings and Bespoke AI are reimagining the connected home through AI innovation and seamless device integration. We're also spotlighting wider innovations across Samsung — including The Movingstyle portable screen and core on-device AI technologies shaping the future of everyday life.

✔ Subscribe to read stories!

news_articles.headline: India’s Most Expensive Smartphones: Luxury, Foldables and Flagship Power Redefine Premium Mobile Market
news_articles.summary: Luxury smartphones costing over ₹2 lakh are gaining attention as Indian buyers increasingly embrace premium devices.

news_articles.headline: Samsung debuts first 6K gaming monitor with dual-mode speeds
news_articles.summary: First 6K gaming monitor: Samsung's 32-inch Odyssey G8 G80HS delivers 6144 x 3456 resolution at 165Hz, a first for gaming displays.
